children.heading: Director
children.label: 1 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the United States Geological Survey.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “highly fluorinated compound” means a perfluoroalkyl substance or a polyfluoroalkyl substance with at least one fully fluorinated carbon atom.

children.heading: Fully fluorinated carbon atom
children.label: i Fully fluorinated carbon atom
children.text: The term “fully fluorinated carbon atom” means a carbon atom on which all the hydrogen substituents have been replaced by fluorine.

children.heading: Perfluoroalkyl substance
children.label: ii Perfluoroalkyl substance
children.text: The term “perfluoroalkyl substance” means a chemical of which all of the carbon atoms are fully fluorinated carbon atoms.

children.heading: Polyfluoroalkyl substance
children.label: iii Polyfluoroalkyl substance
children.text: The term “polyfluoroalkyl substance” means a chemical containing at least one fully fluorinated carbon atom and at least one carbon atom that is not a fully fluorinated carbon atom.
